# Notes 1.1.7 wire fixtures

These deterministic fixtures model the complete IMA Notes 1.1.7 response envelope described by the repository's unique [contract](../../../docs/IMA_OPENAPI_CONTRACT_1_1_7.md). They were derived from the archived 1.1.7 evidence, not captured from a user account. Credentials, personal text, and real identifiers must never be added. Use `note_test_*`, `folder_test_*`, fixed timestamps, and `example.com` URLs when updating them.
